description: Email with explicit exclusivity clause covering competitor brands
raw_text:
Hi,

I'm Rachel from PureBean Coffee. We'd love to work with you on an Instagram Reel campaign for our cold brew launch.

Details:
- 1 Instagram Reel (60 sec)
- Timeline: 2 weeks
- Budget: KRW 900,000
- Revisions: Up to 2 rounds
- Payment: Within 7 days of publish

Exclusivity clause: We require that you do not promote any competing coffee or beverage brands for 45 days before and after publish date.

Looking forward to your reply.

Rachel Moon
PureBean Coffee

expected_fields.exclusivity: no competing coffee or beverage brands for 45 days
